_comment: Synthetic program emails for 45621-B. 'restricted' sensitivity items are visible only to personas listed in acl (drives the permission-trimming governance demo). date format ISO. thread groups related mail.

emails.subject: ESCALATION: 45621-B PPAP qualification slip — schedule risk to Aeronix flight test
emails.body: Dana, the Aeronix program office is formally escalating. The 45621-B PPAP qualification was due to complete by 19-JUN and your last status showed it slipping to early July. This threatens our flight-test window. We need (1) a committed recovery date, (2) confirmation the material supplier issue is contained, and (3) a written risk summary by Friday. Please treat as priority.

emails.subject: RE: ESCALATION: 45621-B PPAP qualification slip
emails.body: Karen, acknowledged. We commit to: a recovery date of 03-JUL for qualification completion, contingent on closing the material hardness finding; containment plan in place with Apex Alloys; and a written risk summary to you by 12-JUN. Elena Cho (Engineering Lead) owns the qualification recovery plan.

emails.subject: Material hardness non-conformance (34 HRC vs 40-44 HRC) — Apex Alloys lot 24-118
emails.body: Program team — flagging an open risk to the program distribution list. During qualification hardness testing, the part showed material hardness non-conformance below the acceptance minimum on two of five units. Both failing units used Apex Alloys Inconel 718 material lot 24-118. Priya is investigating material lot variation. Until we have root cause, I am holding qualification sign-off. This is the top open risk on the program.

emails.subject: RE: Material hardness non-conformance (34 HRC vs 40-44 HRC) — Apex Alloys lot 24-118
emails.body: Raj — confirmed lot 24-118 is below spec on hardness (measured 34 HRC vs spec 40-44 HRC). I believe the non-conformance is a material lot issue, not a design issue. Recommend: (1) quarantine lot 24-118, (2) request a replacement lot from Apex Alloys with cert, (3) re-run the hardness acceptance test on units remachined with conforming material. I can have conforming material in 5 business days.

emails.subject: PPAP Qualification Plan ownership — 45621-B
emails.body: Confirming for the record: I (Elena Cho) own the 45621-B PPAP Qualification Plan, document QTP-45621B rev D. Raj Patel owns quality sign-off / acceptance. Any change to acceptance criteria goes through Raj.

emails.subject: 45621-B weekly — milestone movement w/c 08-JUN
emails.body: Weekly note: Qualification milestone moved from 19-JUN to 03-JUL pending material rework (see Raj's risk). Design freeze remains complete. First Article Inspection still scheduled 10-JUL. No other milestone movement this week.
